mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC

SELECT * FROM menu
parent_id = #{parentId}
AND deleted = 0
ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu (parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, perms, icon, sort_order, visible, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{menuType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE menu
parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_type = #{menuType}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, perms = #{perms}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
